milestone_label: #5-bootstrap correction-loop importer tool + dry-run smoke covering all 5 row categories and pre-flight error paths
next_steps: Reviewer fills corrected_label / corrected_owner_type / corrected_owner_id / suppress / reviewer / reviewed_at / notes in a collector CSV
Run importer in dry-run, inspect the audit JSON
Run importer with --apply; manual_corrected rows accumulate in recognition_items
When SELECT count(*) FROM recognition_items WHERE status = 'manual_corrected' >= 50, #5-bootstrap retrain becomes runnable
non_goals: Do not retrain (#5-bootstrap retrain still gated by >=50 manual_corrected rows; this tool feeds that gate, it does not trigger it)
Do not write to v_training_corrections directly (it is a derived view)
Do not mutate persons/tools/devices ownership tables
Do not add server endpoints; reuses PATCH /api/projects/:pid/recognition_items/:id/correct

smoke_runs.name: full-collector-csv
smoke_runs.verdict_explanation: No reviewer columns are filled in the collector smoke output yet, so importer correctly classifies all 214 rows as unreviewed and issues zero PATCHes.

covered_paths: set valid -- recognition_item_id lookup HIT, owner present (person 383b613a-c5af-4033-9e44-e08c71bb1144)
set bad owner -- lookup HIT, owner absent (person 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000) -- pre-flight error
set bad project -- lookup MISS (detection 9999999 / project 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000) -- pre-flight error
clear -- explicit on-the-spot lookup, no error
smoke_runs.name: mini-categories-coverage
smoke_runs.verdict_explanation: All 5 categories are reached; both pre-flight error paths (owner-absent, lookup-miss) trigger correctly without issuing PATCHes; valid set+clear rows resolve recognition_items.id via psql and would PATCH cleanly under --apply.

status_note: Read-only-by-default Python CLI (tools/bootstrap_correction_importer.py). Reads a bootstrap_correction_collector.py CSV after a human has filled the reviewer columns, classifies each row into unreviewed | suppress | set | clear | invalid, resolves recognition_items.id from (project_id, detection_id) via psql, pre-flight-validates owner existence (deleted_at IS NULL), and either prints a dry-run preview (default) or PATCHes /api/projects/<pid>/recognition_items/<id>/correct (--apply). Closes the second half of the >=50-correction gate that #5-bootstrap (retrain) is queued behind. Default mode mutates nothing.

preflight_checks: recognition_items.id lookup by (project_id, detection_id) -- batched single VALUES JOIN
owner existence in persons|tools|devices with deleted_at IS NULL

row_categories.clear: both fields empty AND reviewer set; PATCH with {} NULLs the corrected_* columns and reverts status
row_categories.invalid: half-filled (one of owner_type/owner_id without the other, or owner_type not in person|tool|device); counted in audit, never sent
row_categories.set: corrected_owner_type + corrected_owner_id both populated; PATCH with {owner_type,owner_id} sets corrected_owner_* and flips status to manual_corrected
row_categories.suppress: suppress truthy; recorded in audit only (no DB mutation, endpoint has no suppress path)
row_categories.unreviewed: all 7 reviewer fields blank; skipped silently

validation.apply_smoke_run_against_live_server_reas: Avoid mutating live recognition_items state in the #2-family Path B truth-table; --apply path will be exercised by the reviewer when ingesting filled CSVs. Pre-flight + payload assembly are fully covered above.
